description.zh_CN: 将本地 Markdown 知识库与 OpenClaw 集成，支持语义检索和上下文注入
description.en_US: Integrate your local Markdown knowledge base with OpenClaw for semantic search and context injection

description.zh_CN: 初始化知识库配置并构建初始索引
description.en_US: Initialize knowledge base config and build initial index

post_install_message.zh_CN: ✅ 安装完成！请将 Markdown 文档放入 ~/Knowledge 目录，然后运行 `python3 ~/.openclaw/skills/markdown-knowledge/scripts/knowledge_base.py build` 构建索引。
post_install_message.en_US: ✅ Installation complete! Place your Markdown documents in ~/Knowledge and run `python3 ~/.openclaw/skills/markdown-knowledge/scripts/knowledge_base.py build` to build the index.

description.zh_CN: Markdown 文档所在目录路径

description.en_US: Path for storing the search index

description.zh_CN: 检索返回的最大结果数
description.en_US: Maximum number of search results to return

description.zh_CN: 是否自动定时刷新索引
description.en_US: Whether to automatically refresh the index periodically

commands.name: build
commands.description: 构建或更新知识库索引

changes.zh_CN:
【目录结构】按标准 skill 结构重组，新建 scripts/(knowledge_base.py)、references/(PROJECT.md、README.md)、assets/ 目录
【核心理念】新增 1.2.1/1.5 章节，阐述

的设计初衷
【使用场景】新增 4.4/4.5 章节：气象专家模式、专业投资配置、构建第二大脑、日常知识积累四大场景
【知识整理】新增知识存储规范（前言matter模板、命名规则、目录结构建议）
【主动刷新】提示用户新增内容后需主动说

确保索引更新
【路径修复】修复 knowledge_base.py 的模块路径引用问题
【代码清理】清理 __pycache__，统一配置加载到 src/config.py
changes.en_US:
【Directory Structure】Reorganized to standard skill structure: scripts/(knowledge_base.py), references/(PROJECT.md, README.md), assets/
【Core Philosophy】Added 1.2.1/1.5 explaining the design vision:

【Usage Scenarios】Added 4.4/4.5: Weather Expert Mode, Professional Investment, Building Second Brain, Daily Knowledge Accumulation
【Knowledge Organization】Added best practices for storing knowledge (frontmatter template, naming rules, directory structure)
【Active Refresh】Reminder for users to explicitly say

after adding new content
【Path Fix】Fixed module import paths in knowledge_base.py
【Code Cleanup】Removed __pycache__, unified config loading into src/config.py
